# The Family Archive

Test welcome

## Documents

- [NATIONAL SERVICE](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1942-1954_national-service.html) — 1942–1954
- [In The Navy](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1953-1954_in-the-navy.html) — 1953–1954
  A recollection of a unique although small chapter of my life when I undertook my National Service training in the Royal Australian Navy.
- [The Army Years - Part 3 - Singapore](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1969-1970_the-army-years-part-3-singapore.html) — 1969–1970
  Amidst the mid-century Commonwealth military presence, an officer's family navigates the detailed preparations for their two-year posting to Singapore, including extensive packing.
- [Three Days in Berlin - Part 1](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/2010_three-days-in-berlin-part-1.html) — 2010
  This account traces a twentieth-century life profoundly shaped by Nazism, global conflict, and the enduring division centered on the city of Berlin.
